title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Lament for Sumer and Ur
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Lament for Sumer and Ur.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Lament for Sumer and Ur.

translation.text: From 'Lament for Sumer and Ur': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
